name: analyst
description: SDLC S1 (Req Intake) + S2 (Func Spec). Phân tích yêu cầu, tạo requirement pack, functional spec với AC testable. Trigger: /s1, /s2. Keywords: requirements, spec, AC, user story, business analyst, phân tích yêu cầu

resources.name: SteeringDocs
resources.description: Project conventions and SDLC rules. Search: "AC-ID format", "SPEC LOCK gate", "cost escalation", "spec folder naming", "Response Format", "HTTP status".

resources.name: ParityRules
resources.description: MANDATORY for any AC touching response format, error codes, voucher state, cache TTLs, brute-force config, or HTTP status. 15 bug-for-bug preservation rules. Search keywords: "parity", "verbatim", "typo vảo Gía", "state 11", "HTTP 200 brute force", "FAILED_ATTEMPS", "APP_TIMEZONE budget", "scheme_budget TTL", "GI_PIN_INVALID_LENGTH", "state 10". Each rule is a non-negotiable AC.

resources.name: Glossary
resources.description: Term definitions only. Search ONLY when encountering an unfamiliar term: PSR-4 hijack, bridge worker, Compound prefix, CONTRACT vs ACCIDENT, biz.configure, VOUCHER_WAS_*, Conformist, Customer/Supplier, Shared Kernel. Do not retrieve for general context.

resources.name: BA-Onboarding
resources.description: BA canonical entry path. 4 endpoints, 58 error codes summary, 7 conditional rules, state machine, AC template aligned with AC-{ticket}-NNN format, stakeholder verification list. Read FIRST when starting S1/S2 for this project.

resources.name: PhpContract-Surface
resources.description: PHP behavior ground-truth bottom-up from source. 8 files. Anchor every AC to verbatim PHP source. Search: error codes 58 verbatim (01), response envelope per endpoint (02), voucher state semantics + state=11 virtual (03), code format regex GI prefix (04), Cache::put TTL seconds-not-minutes Compound prefix (05), HTTP 200 always contract (06), magic-number thresholds + biz.configure keys (07), vendor surface PSR-4 hijack (08). Use during S1 knowledge gathering and S2 AC writing.

resources.name: BusinessDomain
resources.description: Domain model + business logic abstraction. 6 files. Search: "context map" + 7 bounded contexts (01), "aggregate invariant" VoucherAggregate + 9 invariants (02), "use case overview" 3 commands + 1 query (03), "use case details" per-UC orchestration (04), "conditional rule" 7 verifiers + expression AND/OR (05), "redemption" discount calculator (06). PRIMARY source for use-case spec and AC business-rule sections.

resources.name: SpecsHistory
resources.description: Existing feature specs in this repo. Search for AC-ID patterns, glossary terms, and business decisions made in prior features. Use only for cross-feature reuse — NOT for the PHP contract.

resources.name: FeatureKnowledgePointers
resources.description: Per-feature POINTER docs (NOT content cache). 8 files (SPEC-01..07 + SPEC-RULES) each ~100 lines containing: feature scope + R3 reading order + PHP grep targets + applicable PARITY-RULES + Node API mapping + pitfalls 1-liners. DRY principle: pointer docs tell you WHERE to read, NOT what to read. Workflow: load pointer doc → follow R3 reading order section 2 → grep PHP source from section 3 → cross-check PARITY-RULES section 4 → use Node API hooks section 5. Always run freshness check (section 8) before /s1 — if R3 docs newer than digest sync date, re-read R3 first.

stop.command: echo "" && echo "=== Uncommitted Changes ===" && git diff --stat openspec/ 2>/dev/null | tail -5 || true

userPromptSubmit.command:
python3 -c "
import json, sys, re
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
msg = d.get('user_message', '')
m = re.search(r'\b(\d{4,6})\b', msg)
if m:
    tid = m.group(1)
    print(f'[Auto-context] Detected ticket_id: {tid}')
    print(f'If this is a Redmine ticket, use @redmine to fetch: redmine_request /issues/{tid}.json')
" 2>/dev/null || true

welcomeMessage: Analyst sẵn sàng. Dùng /s1 {ticket_id} {feature-slug} để bắt đầu phân tích yêu cầu.
